energy_status: Direct device GPU time comes from process-scoped Metal System Trace on real iPhone hardware. Direct energy is intentionally skipped in this run and remains manual-pending until per-case Power Profiler traces are imported.

layers.label: Engine Microbenchmarks
notes: UIKit engine coverage currently spans primitive views, animation effects, and primitive lifecycle slices.

layers.label: Representative Screen Flows
notes: Flow coverage now spans launch/lifecycle and user-journey cases, but some committed journey families are still missing from the native device battery.

layers.label: OS-Bridge Benchmarks
notes: Bridge coverage measures app-owned wrapper overhead separately from system-owned UI surfaces.

styles.label: Idiomatic UIKit
notes: Idiomatic retained-view parity is the default UIKit baseline in this suite.

styles.label: Hand-Optimized UIKit
notes: The optimized UIKit slice now covers the full currently implemented journey, bridge, and endurance families, plus primitive-lifecycle, animation-effect, image-pipeline, and large-editor text-input peers; launch/lifecycle, layout/invalidation, authoring, component microbenchmarks, and stress/pathological traps still need tuned peers.

battery.label: Launch & Lifecycle
notes: The current XCTest harness does not yet run a dedicated launch/resume/deep-link battery with XCTApplicationLaunchMetric.

battery.label: Primitive Mount / Update / Destroy
notes: Flat rects, labels, cards, and images cover mount plus mutate; the empty-root, shared control-set, and retained-view remove-all/remount slices are still incomplete.

battery.label: Layout & Invalidation
notes: Dedicated relayout batteries now exist, but not every required flat/deep/grid invalidation slice is present yet.

battery.label: Text & Text Input
notes: UILabel parity and the input-form journey exist, but the full large-editor typing, paste, and selection battery is still incomplete.

battery.label: Image Pipeline
notes: UIImageView and zoom workloads exist, but bytes-ready, decode, upload, and first-visible phases are not yet split into separate metrics.
The official camera-preview battery includes the parked pure-custom NV12 live preview path and the matching AVCaptureVideoPreviewLayer baseline on the same build and device.
The shipping-oriented actual app-host camera pair remains a separate bucket and may still be partial or blocked until the UI-test runner path is stable.

battery.label: Lists, Grids, & Chat
notes: Collection-view encode and collection-navigation journey coverage exist, but the full feed/grid/chat scroll matrices are still incomplete.

battery.label: Navigation & Input Latency
notes: Navigation, orchestration, and zoom journeys exist, but direct input-event-to-response batteries are still missing.

battery.label: Animation & Visual Effects
notes: Idiomatic and hand-tuned animation-effect cases now carry native physical-device rows in the official ProMotion battery.

battery.label: State Mutation & Reconciliation
notes: Primitive mutate and orchestration workloads exist, but explicit diff/apply batteries for tree mutation rates and theme swaps are still missing.

battery.label: OS Bridge Overhead
notes: Permission, location, and Bluetooth wrapper overhead is covered, but photo import, file import, share sheet, and transport/decode/render bridge batteries remain missing.

battery.label: Endurance, Memory, & Thermal Drift
notes: There is still not a complete long-run open/close, tab-switch, and idle-animation endurance battery in the current UIKit suite.

battery.label: Stress & Pathological Regressions
notes: The explicit 10k-node, 300-animation, and 100 Hz ticker traps are still incomplete in the UIKit suite.
The UIKit reports now persist explicit contract coverage so the suite does not over-claim comprehensiveness.

Official camera preview rows use the parked microscope full-custom NV12 path (`testCameraNV12LegacyLivePreview`) against the parked AVFoundation preview-layer baseline (`testCameraAVFoundationPreviewLayerLivePreview`). Hybrid preview-layer visible-preview cases remain diagnostic-only and stay out of the default battery.
The device report is the authoritative GPU source. Manual per-case Power Profiler traces still gate true energy coverage.

The shipping-oriented actual app-host camera comparison remains an explicit bucket. Keep `testCameraNV12LegacyRealAppLivePreview` and `testCameraAVFoundationPreviewLayerRealAppLivePreview` out of the default device battery until the UI-test runner launch path is stable enough to produce repeatable JSON and trace outputs.
UILabel multiline layout parity.
Refresh mode: native
GPU counter status: the attached device rejected the Metal GPU Counters profile, so this case includes direct GPU time and GPU latency only.
Frame cadence source: collected through a separate console-summary pass because xctrace did not preserve the launched target's stdout.
Frame cadence source: device console CADisplayLink summary emitted by the measured XCTest workload window.
GPU trace windows: 1

GPU interval attribution status: this trace exposed no direct target-process GPU intervals, so GPU time and latency were summarized from compositor-inclusive Metal GPU intervals within the same trace window.
GPU compositor detail: the compositor-inclusive overlap was dominated by `` (34 rows, 3.248 ms total across 1 workload window(s)).

GPU metric semantics: `gpu_time_s` is the total overlapping Metal GPU execution duration inside each bounded workload window. `gpu_latency_s` is the mean CPU-to-GPU latency across overlapping Metal GPU intervals inside that same window.

GPU counter status: the trace exposed GPU counter tables, but there were no direct counter samples inside the bounded workload window; GPU time and GPU latency remained available from Metal System Trace.
Energy trace status: skipped for this run; import a per-case Power Profiler .trace or raw .atrc later to add direct device energy.
Clock metric scope: promoted `signpost_frame_present_s` into `clock_s` for the official matched on-screen Oxide/UIKit comparison; raw XCTest wall clock is preserved under `xctest_clock_s`.

Official parked microscope full-custom camera preview benchmark: raw NV12 frames via AVCaptureVideoDataOutput + CVMetalTexture, with Oxide owning the visible preview and no AVCaptureVideoPreviewLayer.
Refresh mode: native
GPU trace status: skipped for this case because `--trace-seconds 0` disabled the attached Metal trace.

GPU trace source: collected through a separate launched xctrace pass after the console-summary camera run, so camera stage summaries and GPU timing stay available without the flaky attached-trace camera path.
GPU counter status: the attached device rejected the Metal GPU Counters profile, so this case includes direct GPU time and GPU latency only.
Capture contract validation: stable back-camera 1280x720@30 YUV-family negotiation confirmed before the report was accepted.
Capture contract source: app-owned parked benchmark summary emitted through the device console launch log.

Capture contract: source=oxide-live transport=AVCaptureVideoDataOutput+CVMetalTexture(NV12) device=back preset=inputPriority request=1280x720@30 420f active=1280x720@30.00 420f range=full color=srgb mirrored=false wideColorAuto=false
Stage timing source: app-owned parked benchmark summary emitted through the device console launch log.
Memory breakdown source: app-owned parked benchmark summary emitted through the device console launch log.

Observed preview memory breakdown (max observed): camera.samplePoolEst=40.92MB, camera.peakActiveSampleEst=1.41MB, camera.retainedSampleEst=5.64MB, camera.retainedPublishedSlots=5.64MB, renderer.total=3.13MB, view.drawablePoolEst=22.60MB, renderer.pendingCmdBuffers=1, renderer.pendingPresentDrawables=0, renderer.pendingPresentTextures=0, renderer.previewDepthMax=0, renderer.previewDepthShare=0:100%/1:0%/2+:0%, renderer.previewSkipRate=0.0%, renderer.previewFrameAgeP95=25.40ms, renderer.previewFrameAgeMax=25.40ms, camera.samplePoolSurfaces=29, camera.activeSampleSurfaces=0, camera.activeSampleBuffers=0, camera.peakActiveSampleSurfaces=1, camera.peakActiveSampleBuffers=1, camera.sampleReuseFrames=0/29, camera.sampleReuseRate=0.0%, camera.sampleReusedSurfaces=0, camera.sampleMaxReuseGapFrames=0, camera.retainedSampleSurfaces=4, camera.retainedPublishedSlotSurfaces=4, camera.retainedLatestPixelBufferSurfaces=0, camera.cpuFrameDeliveryActive=0.0%, camera.retainedLatestPixelBufferActive=0.0%, xctestPeakMinusKnownP50=52.83MB

Per-opportunity preview tick ring (measured window): ticks=120, skipShare=75.8%, acquireShare=24.2%, submitShare=24.2%, previewDepth p50/p95/p99/max=0/0/0/0, previewFrameAge p50/p95/p99/max=25.34/25.40/25.40/25.40ms
Frame cadence source: device console CADisplayLink summary emitted by the measured XCTest workload window.

GPU metric semantics: `gpu_time_s` is the total overlapping Metal GPU execution duration inside each bounded workload window. `gpu_latency_s` is the mean CPU-to-GPU latency across overlapping Metal GPU intervals inside that same window.

Scheme: OxideUIKitPerf

Device flow: build/install the host app once, collect CPU metrics through one native-only batched xcodebuild test-without-building run, then record per-case process-scoped Metal traces on the phone. Parked and launch-handshake workloads are launched through xctrace and driven by the shared Darwin ready/start/complete notifications; camera cases that still need console summaries retain the device-console launch path.
GPU trace: process-scoped Metal System Trace + Points of Interest, with Metal GPU Counters enabled when the device supports that counter profile.
Energy trace: manual per-case Power Profiler import from an exported .trace or raw .atrc captured for the same OxideHost workload.
Refresh mode: native
Refresh policy: the official device harness is native-only. The old 60 Hz/device-default matrix was removed to keep the committed battery focused on the target shipping refresh path.
